title: Cake Turntable,Uten 12 Inch Rotating Glass Cake Turntable, Rotating Cake Stand with Non-Slip Rubber Bottom Beautiful Baking Tools, Cake Making Equipment
features: 【High Quality Material】: The professional cake turntable countertop is made of thickened 8mm tempered glass, and the base has a built-in steel plate, which has excellent durability and can meet the needs of daily cake making.

【Quiet and smooth rotation】:The rotating cake stand adopts high-speed silent bearings, and the 360° rotation is stable and not stuck. The base is made of silicone non-slip mat, which is easier to absorb on the desktop and can prevent the turntable from sliding during the cake making process.

【Safe and easy to use】:The glass material makes it easy to clean, allowing you to focus on creating stunning cake designs and not worry about cleaning up afterward. The glass rounded edges of the cake turntable are polished very smooth, and feel comfortable to the touch. The corners are ergonomically designed, and the rounded edges enhance the overall texture, which is safe and reliable.

【Multiple Uses】: The Uten cake stand is 12 inches in diameter, capable of holding many sizes of cakes. Whether you plan to bake small or large cakes, the 12-inch size provides plenty of room for your needs. Not only can you use this cake turntable to make cakes, but you can also use it as a beautiful cake stand, or do flower arrangements and pour paint work on the turntable.

【Premium Choice】: You can display dazzling cakes, cupcakes, pastries, muffins, cookies on the 12 inch cake stand for birthdays, Christmas, weddings, graduation parties or any other events. This glass cake turntable is a special equipment for making cakes, it is the best gift choice for cake bakers.
description: Product Description Uten Cake Turntable Handmade cakes are a great way to show love and sincerity, and are perfect for parties, birthdays, and weddings. Display your birthday cake in an attractive manner on the glass cake stand. In addition to smaller cakes, cupcakes or cookies, it can also accommodate larger cakes due to its larger diameter. The simple design makes the cake turntable a true all-rounder. Rotating cake pans are also great for decorating more intricate cakes. Makes cake decorating a breeze! specifications_table.Care instructions: ‎Hand wash with mild soap and warm water, avoiding abrasive sponges
